name: sparse-context PPM
spec: extend A18 PPM order-4 to order-N with sparse context selection (frequency threshold τ via reservoir sampling); HashMap<context_hash, PPM_node> with LRU 64MB cap; Cormack-Horspool DMC 1987 + Shkarin PPMii 2002 textbook port

falsifiers.retire: memory > 256MB during encode on 79KB n6 atlas

name: corpus grammar induction (Stolcke-Omohundro PCFG)
spec: MDL-based probabilistic context-free grammar merging (Stolcke-Omohundro 1994); Pass1 induce PCFG over byte symbols; Pass2 re-encode with PPM hybrid byte-fallback
raw_156_orthogonality_risk: may shadow A1 structural dedup; F-A24-3 enforces stacking regression < 1pp

name: type-aware compression (hexa AST entropy model)
spec: .hexa AST band split (keyword/identifier/literal/operator) with per-band PPM; .json type-detection (key/value/delimiter) per-band PPM-3
raw_18_caveat: requires hexa AST API exposed in hexa-lang/self/parser/ast.hexa — fixpoint preserved per raw 18

name: adaptive context-window resize
spec: per-corpus dynamic A18 LZ+PPM window: small<4KB→1024, medium 4-64KB→16K, large>64KB→256K; window size in HXC v1 footer per file
raw_156_placement: parameter axis on A18; no new placement

falsifiers.retire: per-file footer overhead negates saving on small files

name: cross-language federation (TS/Node/Python/Bash)
spec: extend A19 federated dict to TS / Python / Bash hot-paths; shared keyword vocab across languages
raw_9_compatible: partial — encoder hexa-only (raw 9), corpora cross-language (read-side ingestion)
raw_156_placement: same as A19 cross-file shared dict; federation scope expansion

name: semantic embedding-based
spec: vector-quantised semantic embedding of phrases / function bodies; decoder reconstructs from embedding ID + per-instance delta
